task_completion.description: Calculate the total monthly cost for Carrier A (MegaTel).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the calculated cost of $195 (or 195) associated with MegaTel or Carrier A in a spreadsheet, text document, or calculator.

task_completion.description: Calculate the total monthly cost for Carrier B (ConnectPlus), including the data overage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the calculated cost of $190 (or 190) associated with ConnectPlus or Carrier B. This should account for the 2GB overage.

task_completion.description: Calculate the total monthly cost for Carrier C (FamilyLink).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the calculated cost of $160 (or 160) associated with FamilyLink or Carrier C.

task_completion.description: Identify the most cost-effective plan among the three carriers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text or an indicator explicitly stating that Carrier C or FamilyLink is the best, cheapest, or most cost-effective option.

task_completion.description: Calculate the total monthly savings compared to the current plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the calculated savings of $80 (or 80), which is the difference between the current $240 plan and the new $160 plan.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI application (like a spreadsheet, calculator, or text editor) to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with a graphical application, not just running a script or echoing text in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent actually performed the calculations rather than just pasting the final answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate steps, formulas in a spreadsheet, or typed out math (e.g., base fee + per-line fees + data) rather than just the final numbers appearing out of nowhere.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy-paste a pre-written solution.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final output should be formatted by the agent in the tool they are using, showing genuine interaction and data entry.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Family size: 4 lines. Total data usage: 22 GB. Current plan cost: $240/month. Carrier A (MegaTel) cost: $195 ($85 base + $20*4 lines + $30 data). Carrier B (ConnectPlus) cost: $190 ($60 base + $25*4 lines + $15*2GB overage). Carrier C (FamilyLink) cost: $160 ($100 base + $15*4 lines). Best plan: Carrier C (FamilyLink) at $160/month. Total savings: $80/month ($240 - $160).
